name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC workflow with integrated code review, Diátaxis documentation, analysis, observability, and git lifecycle. 13 lifecycle commands (10 stages + wf-next routing + wf-status dashboard + wf-resume context recovery) with branch-aware git operations, 31 review commands, 7 aggregate reviews, 11 skills (4 analysis + 7 Diátaxis doc writing/review), and setup-wide-logging command.
